name: ts-for-gir
description: Typescript .d.ts generator from GIR for gjs

scripts.build: gjsify run build:app && gjsify run build:types && gjsify run build:examples && gjsify run build:json && gjsify run build:doc
scripts.check: gjsify run check:lint && gjsify run check:app
scripts.update: gjsify run update:submodules && gjsify run update:packages
scripts.publish:app: gjsify run build:app && gjsify foreach -v -p --no-private --include '@ts-for-gir/*' --include '@gi.ts/*' --exec -- gjsify publish --trusted --tolerate-republish --tag latest --access public --provenance
scripts.publish:types: gjsify foreach -v -p --no-private --include '@girs/*' --exec -- gjsify publish --tolerate-republish --tag latest --access public
scripts.publish: gjsify run publish:app && gjsify run publish:types
scripts.test:types: gjsify run build:types && gjsify run check:types
scripts.test:examples: gjsify run build:examples && gjsify run check:examples && gjsify run test:examples:cli
scripts.test:examples:cli: gjsify workspace @ts-for-gir-example/cairo-pattern-methods start && gjsify workspace @ts-for-gir-example/glib-2-spawn-command-example start && gjsify workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gio-2-cat-example start && gjsify workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gobject-param-spec start && gjsify workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gio-2-async start && gjsify workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gio-2-action-entries start && gjsify workspace @ts-for-gir-example/gio-2-iterate start
scripts.test:e2e: gjsify run build:app && gjsify run build:app:gjs && gjsify workspace @ts-for-gir-test/e2e test
scripts.test: gjsify run build && gjsify run test:types && gjsify run test:examples && gjsify run test:tests

author: Pascal Garber <pascal@mailfreun.de>

resolutions._comment_typescript: Pin types-dev's `typescript@*` devDep to 5.9. The lockfile regen for rc.10 deduplicated `typescript@*` onto `typescript@^6.0.3`, which surfaces three latent TS6-strictness errors in pre-existing generated d.ts (TS1540 module keyword, TS2416 get_toplevel signature, TS2320 duplicate ConstructorProps extends). They predate this PR and need follow-up generator fixes; pinning matches what main's lockfile resolved before the rc.10 bump. Workspace's own `typescript@^6.0.3` toolchain is unaffected.
